recommendations.title: Tour de Pharmacy
recommendations.overview: A mockumentary that chronicles the prevalence of doping in the world of professional cycling.

recommendations.title: John Mulaney: New in Town
recommendations.overview: Stand-up comedian John Mulaney tackles such red-hot topics as quicksand, Motown singers and an elderly man he once met in a bathroom.

recommendations.title: 7 Days in Hell
recommendations.overview: A fictional documentary-style expose on the rivalry between two tennis stars who battled it out in a 1999 match that lasted seven days.

recommendations.title: Gran Torino
recommendations.overview: Disgruntled Korean War veteran Walt Kowalski sets out to reform his neighbor, Thao Lor, a Hmong teenager who tried to steal Kowalski's prized possession: a 1972 Gran Torino.

recommendations.title: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates
recommendations.overview: Mike and Dave are young, adventurous, fun-loving brothers who tend to get out of control at family gatherings. When their sister Jeanie reveals her Hawaiian wedding plans, the rest of the Stangles insist that the brothers bring respectable dates. Aft

recommendations.title: Spring Breakdown
recommendations.overview: Three women in their thirties head to a popular Spring Break destination and try to relive the Spring Break they never had.

recommendations.title: The Marine 3: Homefront
recommendations.overview: A Marine must do whatever it takes to save his kidnapped sister and stop a terrorist attack masterminded by a radical militia group.

recommendations.title: Forever Rich
recommendations.overview: This is the story of Richie and his journey to become the greatest rap-artist in the Netherlands. One evening he is violently mugged by a group of teenagers and loses his most prized possession: an expensive watch. When images of the humiliating robb

recommendations.title: Evidence
recommendations.overview: Ryan is making a documentary on his friend, Brett, about camping for the first time. However, once they begin camping, they discover that there is a mysterious figure that is hunting them.

recommendations.title: Crocodile 2: Death Roll
recommendations.overview: After a bank robbery, four criminals escape to Mexico, but a storm causes an accident which takes down the plane where several die in the crash. The criminals take it into their own hands to continue when one survivor is attacked and eaten by a croco
